arts.ttl: Chelsea agree fee to buy Sporting CP midfielder – Staying where he is until summer
arts.sum: Chelsea can be relied upon in recent years to keep things going at the end of the transfer market, and they’re not letting anyone down in this winter market. The Blues remain active on a number of fronts, with multiple incomings and outgoings possible before the end of play this evening. arts.sum: Caleb Wiley played just six times for Strasbourg - who are owned by Chelsea chief Todd Boehly - but was recalled by the club on deadline day and has now linked up with Watford for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Chelsea enquire over Sporting Lisbon teenager Dario Essugo - as Blues look to bring in midfield reinforcements on deadline day
arts.sum: Essugo, 19, has spent the season on loan with Spanish outfit Las Palmas and has impressed with his displays in the heart of midfield throughout 2024-25.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Brighton striker Ferguson on loan
arts.sum: “I can see and know how big West Ham United is," he told the club's official website . West Ham United have signed Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson on loan until the end of the season.
